title: CreateCrushingAE
description:
An addon to Create and Applied Energistics, 
making the crushing wheel crush blocks like the hammer
body:
An addon to Create and Applied Energistics, 
making the crushing wheel crush blocks like  the hammer,
Recipes include:
Sand to dust, 
Netherrack to Crushed Netherrack,
Endstone to Crushed Endstone,
Granite to Crushed Granite,
Andesite to Crushed Andesite,
Diorite to to Crushed Diorite,
Skystone to Crushed Skystone,
